searches_performed.result: 74 results, none matching Central Fund of Israel

4 results: CENTRAL FUNDING COMPANY INC. OF NEW YORK (1333234, Inactive), CENTRAL FUNDING CORPORATION (32376, Active, Foreign), CENTRAL FUNDING SOURCE CORP. (7169869, Active), CENTRAL FUNDING SOURCE INC. (2370296, Inactive). None are CFI.

finding: Central Fund of Israel does not appear in the NY DOS Division of Corporations database. CFI is registered with the NY Charities Bureau (reg# 02-55-79, active since 04/01/1980) but has no corresponding DOS corporation filing. This is unusual for a 501(c)(3) nonprofit processing $96M+ annually in New York. Possible explanations: (1) incorporated in another state, (2) filed under a different name, (3) operating as an unincorporated association, (4) incorporated pre-digital-records (1979) and not migrated to the online database. Further investigation: check Nassau County Clerk records or request certificate of incorporation from Charities Bureau.
